smoke_test_method: Re-grep / re-read every cited evidence path against current HEAD. F-005 was already classified `struck` (resolved-in-profile) at Phase 10 draft time; F-011 was already classified `drift-only` (declared-vs-enforced caveat) at Phase 10 draft time.
